summary: The conversation is about a commercial investment opportunity in a mall being built in Gurgaon. Speaker 0 is explaining the details of the investment to Speaker 1, including the return on investment and the payment terms. Speaker 1 is seeking clarification and details about the investment. The discussion is about a specific project where a mall will be built and shops will be rented out, with the investor receiving the rental income.

key_discussion_points.details: A mall is being built in Gurgaon and the speaker is explaining the investment opportunity to Speaker 1, including a 12 percent return on investment and a lifetime rental income.
The investor needs to pay 60 percent of the investment amount now and the remaining 40 percent when the project is ready, with the option to pay after 2-2.5 years.
The project involves building a mall in Gurgaon, with shops being rented out and the investor receiving the rental income.
